BackstoryDef.title: biter husk
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: This corpse rotted into a snapping biter that only remembers hunger.

BackstoryDef.title: grave hunger
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Death stripped away the rest of its life and left only a slow, biting hunger.

BackstoryDef.title: crawler husk
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: This broken corpse drags itself over the ground on ruined limbs.

BackstoryDef.title: dragged below
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Its last memory is of being pulled down and coming back wrong.

BackstoryDef.title: boomer husk
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: This swollen corpse bubbles with pressure and corrosive bile.

BackstoryDef.title: bloated rot
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The body kept filling after death until it became a walking sac of decay.

BackstoryDef.title: sick husk
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: This corpse is soaked in dark infection and foul blood.

BackstoryDef.title: plague rot
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: What rose from the grave carries a sickness that spreads with every wound.

BackstoryDef.title: drowned husk
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: This waterlogged corpse sloshes, drips, and lurches back toward the shore.

BackstoryDef.title: sunken rot
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: It died below the surface and rose again with the lake still clinging to it.

BackstoryDef.title: heavy husk
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: This hulking corpse is all dead weight, thick muscle, and blunt force.

BackstoryDef.title: grave brute
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Death did not dull its strength. It came back as a hulking heavy that simply keeps coming.

BackstoryDef.title: grabber husk
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: This corpse grew a rotten tongue that lashes out and drags prey close.

BackstoryDef.title: tongue rot
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: It shambles behind the horde until it can hook something living and reel it in.
